class.name: CODIF_DDO
class.help: Aqui se Guardan las cabeceras de los conceptos
class.label: Cabecera de Codificadoras

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_codif_ddo as oi_codif_ddo, t0.oi_codif_ddo as CODE, t0.oi_codif_ddo as TEXT FROM LIQ94_CODIF as t0 ORDER BY oi_codif_ddo asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_codif_ddo as oi_codif_ddo FROM LIQ94_CODIF as t0 ORDER BY oi_codif_ddo asc')/ROWS/ROW

assosiation.label: Items Impuesto a las Ganancias DDO
assosiation.name: ITEMS_IG

form-properties.label: Items Impuesto a las Ganancias DDO

assosiation.description: Mantiene los Tipos de Liquidación por Grupo
assosiation.label: Tipos de Liquidación por Grupo Liquidacion
assosiation.name: TLIQ_GRUPO

form-properties.label: Tipos de Liquidación por Grupo Liquidacion

assosiation.description: Almacena los datos de los Convenios
assosiation.label: Valores por Convenios
assosiation.name: CONVENIOS

qry:select.name: sql2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.c_item_ig , t.d_item_ig , td.c_tipo_deduc , t.e_orden FROM LIQ04_ITEMS_IG as t, LIQ03_TIPOS_DEDUC as td JOIN t.oi_tipo_deduc left outer td.oi_tipo_deduc ORDER BY c_item_ig ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.e_anio as e_anio, t.e_mes , td.c_item_ig , t.n_importe FROM LIQ04_IDIG as t, LIQ04_ITEMS_IG as td JOIN t.oi_item_ig LEFT OUTER td.oi_item_ig WHERE t.e_anio = {#FILTRO:@e_anio} ORDER BY e_mes ASC, c_item_ig ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql3AnioAnt
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.e_anio as e_anio, t.e_mes , td.c_item_ig , t.n_importe FROM LIQ04_IDIG as t, LIQ04_ITEMS_IG as td JOIN t.oi_item_ig LEFT OUTER td.oi_item_ig WHERE t.e_anio = ({#FILTRO:@e_anio} -1) OR t.e_anio = ({#FILTRO:@e_anio}-2) ORDER BY e_mes ASC, c_item_ig ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sqlCONVENIOS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT tr.c_convenio, tr.d_convenio, tr.oi_convenio FROM ORG18_CONVENIOS as tr ORDER BY c_convenio ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sqlCategorias
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT td.oi_convenio, td.c_categoria , td.d_categoria , td.oi_categoria , td.n_suplemento_1, td.n_suplemento_2, td.n_suplemento_3, td.n_suplemento_4, td.n_valor_hora, td.l_prom_auto, td.e_secuencia, (td.e_secuencia+10000000) as e_order FROM ORG18_CATEGORIAS as td')/ROWS/ROW, $c in $PARAM/CONVENIO_DDO JOIN $r/@oi_convenio INNER $c/@oi_convenio ORDERBY $r/@e_order ASC, $r/@c_categoria ASC

qry:select.name: sqlANTIGUEDAD
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_categoria , t.e_antig_anios , (t.e_antig_anios+1000000) as e_order, t.n_sueldo_basico , t.n_suplemento_1 , t.n_suplemento_2 , t.n_suplemento_3 , t.n_suplemento_4 FROM ORG18_CATEG_ANTIG as t')/ROWS/ROW, $c in $PARAM/CONVENIO_DDO/CATEG/CATEG_DDO JOIN $r/@oi_categoria INNER $c/@oi_categoria ORDERBY $r/@e_order ASC

qry:select.name: sqlADICIONALES
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG18_CATEG_ADIC.n_valor, ORG18_CATEG_ADIC.oi_categoria , ORG39_ADICIONALES.c_adicional, ORG39_ADICIONALES.d_adicional FROM ORG18_CATEG_ADIC, ORG39_ADICIONALES JOIN ORG39_ADICIONALES.oi_adicional INNER ORG18_CATEG_ADIC.oi_adicional')/ROWS/ROW, $c in $PARAM/CONVENIO_DDO/CATEG/CATEG_DDO JOIN $r/@oi_categoria INNER $c/@oi_categoria ORDERBY $r/@c_adicional ASC

qry:select.name: sql4.1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT tr.c_convenio, tr.d_convenio, td.c_categoria , td.d_categoria , td.n_suplemento_1, td.n_suplemento_2, td.n_suplemento_3, td.n_suplemento_4, td.n_valor_hora, td.l_prom_auto, td.e_secuencia FROM ORG18_CATEGORIAS as td, ORG18_CONVENIOS as tr JOIN td.oi_convenio inner tr.oi_convenio where td.oi_categoria not in (select t.oi_categoria from ORG18_CATEG_ANTIG as t) ORDER BY c_convenio ASC, c_categoria ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql4
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT td.oi_categoria, tr.c_convenio, tr.d_convenio, td.c_categoria , td.d_categoria , t.oi_categ_antig , td.n_valor_hora, td.l_prom_auto, td.e_secuencia, t.e_antig_anios , t.n_sueldo_basico , t.n_suplemento_1 , t.n_suplemento_2 , t.n_suplemento_3 , t.n_suplemento_4 FROM ORG18_CATEGORIAS as td, ORG18_CONVENIOS as tr, ORG18_CATEG_ANTIG as t JOIN td.oi_categoria inner t.oi_categoria , td.oi_convenio inner tr.oi_convenio ORDER BY c_convenio ASC, c_categoria ASC, oi_categ_antig ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql5
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_ig, t.e_anio as e_anio , t.e_mes as e_mes , t.n_tot_imp_d as n_tot_imp_d , t.n_tot_imp_h as n_tot_imp_h , t.n_cuota as n_cuota , t.n_p_rango as n_rango FROM LIQ06_IG as t WHERE t.e_anio = {#FILTRO:@e_anio} ORDER BY e_mes ASC, n_tot_imp_d ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql5AnioAnt
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_ig, t.e_anio as e_anio , t.e_mes as e_mes , t.n_tot_imp_d as n_tot_imp_d , t.n_tot_imp_h as n_tot_imp_h , t.n_cuota as n_cuota , t.n_p_rango as n_rango FROM LIQ06_IG as t WHERE t.e_anio = ({#FILTRO:@e_anio}-1) OR t.e_anio = ({#FILTRO:@e_anio}-2) ORDER BY e_mes ASC, n_tot_imp_d ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql5Escala
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_ig, t.e_anio as e_anio , t.e_mes as e_mes , t.n_tot_imp_d as n_tot_imp_d , t.n_tot_imp_h as n_tot_imp_h , t.n_cuota as n_cuota , t.n_p_rango as n_rango FROM LIQ06_IG as t WHERE t.e_anio = 1900 ORDER BY e_mes ASC, n_tot_imp_d ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql5EscalaAnt
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_ig, t.e_anio as e_anio , t.e_mes as e_mes , t.n_tot_imp_d as n_tot_imp_d , t.n_tot_imp_h as n_tot_imp_h , t.n_cuota as n_cuota , t.n_p_rango as n_rango FROM LIQ06_IG as t WHERE t.e_anio = 1901 ORDER BY e_mes ASC, n_tot_imp_d ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql6
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT td.oi_tliq_grupo, t.c_grupo_tliq , tg.c_tipo_liq FROM LIQ02_GRUPOS_TLIQ as t, LIQ02_TLIQ_GRUPO as td, LIQ01_TIPOS_LIQ as tg JOIN td.oi_grupo_tliq inner t.oi_grupo_tliq, td.oi_tipo_liq inner tg.oi_tipo_liq ORDER BY c_grupo_tliq ASC, c_tipo_liq ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sqlPARAMETROS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT ORG26.oi_parametro, ORG26.c_modulo, ORG26.d_clase, ORG26.c_parametro, ORG26.d_parametro, ORG26.d_tipo_parametro, ORG26.e_longitud, ORG26.d_valor, ORG26.l_bloqueado, ORG26.c_padre FROM ORG26_PARAMETROS as ORG26 ORDER BY c_modulo ASC, d_clase ASC, c_parametro ASC, c_padre ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sqlPLANESOS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT OS.c_obra_social, PL.c_plan_os, PL.n_cuota, PL.n_fam1, PL.n_fam2, PL.n_adic1, PL.n_adic2, PL.n_adic3, PL.n_adic4, PL.n_adic5 FROM PER06_OBRAS_SOC as OS, PER06_PLANES_OS as PL JOIN OS.oi_obra_social INNER PL.oi_obra_social ORDER BY c_obra_social ASC, c_plan_os ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

class.label: Categoria DDO

class.name: ANTIG_DDO
